scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs --external electron --external better-sqlite3 --external keytar --external @codetool/shared --external @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs --watch --external electron --external better-sqlite3 --external keytar --external @codetool/shared --external @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent
